---
name: Feature Request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an idea for obsidian-knowledge-brain
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? / 你的需求跟什么问题相关？**
Describe the problem. E.g. "I'm frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution you'd like / 描述你想要的方案**
What should happen?

**Describe alternatives you've considered / 你考虑过的替代方案**
Any workarounds you've tried?

**Scope / 范围**
- [ ] Cross-project knowledge
- [ ] Pre-action triggers
- [ ] Session management (T1/T2/T3)
- [ ] Platform support
- [ ] Other
